description: Cross-binding canonical-form fixtures per discretization RFC §5.4. Each fixture's `expected` field is the byte-exact canonical JSON each binding's canonical_json() must produce.
ts_skip_reason: TypeScript canonicalize cannot emit JSON-integer tokens until gt-ca2u (rep refactor) lands; integer-bearing fixtures emit `1.0` instead of `1`. Skip these for TS only.
follow_up: gt-z8k0 follow-up bead: TS canonicalize once gt-ca2u lands.
